title: Hotel Comparison Report
description: Data contract for the JC Room Blocks Hotel Comparison Report. This is the ONLY seam between the report and its data source: produce an object matching this schema and `hotel-report render` fills the approved .docx template.

venue_name.description: The event venue; shared by all hotels (distances are measured from it).

hotels.description: One entry per hotel; the template repeats its hotel block for each.

website_url.description: If present, the hotel name becomes a hyperlink to this URL.

text.description: Display text, e.g. '#4 of 45 hotels in Charleston'.

url.description: If present, the text becomes a hyperlink to this URL.

rooms.description: Rate-table rows; the template repeats one row per entry.

features.description: Hotel Features bullets (full text of each bullet).

distance_from_venue.description: Numeric part only; the template appends ' miles'. e.g. '8.1'.

cutoff.description: Lead time only; the template appends ' prior to arrival'. e.g. '30 days'.

offered_rate.description: Number (formatted as $1,234) or a pre-formatted string ('Waived').
